# JourneyMap Web Map

JourenyMap WebMap is s client side addon mod  for [JourneyMap Mod][1] that allows you to view your map in a local web browser.

Main uses are displaying your map on another monitor, on a tablet, or any device on your local network. 

This is the official Web Map that used to be included in JourneyMap, it is now an addon mod. 

## What it is Not!

It is not a server sided map. It will do nothing when added to the server. 

[1]: https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap
